---
title: "HCC Research Timeline v2"
subtitle: "CPRIT Grants & Key Publications — Texas 2009–2025"
author: "Texas HCC Research Network"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    smooth-scroll: true
    embed-resources: true
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; background: #edf2f7; }
  h1.title    { color: #1a3a5c; }
  h2          { color: #1a3a5c; border-bottom: 2px solid #c0392b; padding-bottom: 6px; }

  /* ── Intro stats ── */
  .intro-box {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1a3a5c 0%, #c0392b 100%);
    color: white; border-radius: 10px; padding: 1.5rem 2rem; margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
  }
  .stat-row { display:flex; gap:1rem; flex-wrap:wrap; margin:1rem 0; }
  .stat-card {
    background:#fff; border-left:4px solid #c0392b;
    border-radius:6px; padding:.8rem 1.2rem; flex:1; min-width:140px;
  }
  .stat-card .num { font-size:1.5rem; font-weight:700; color:#c0392b; }
  .stat-card .lbl { font-size:.75rem; color:#666; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.05em; }

  /* ── Legend ── */
  .legend {
    display:flex; gap:1.2rem; flex-wrap:wrap; align-items:center;
    padding:.6rem 1rem; background:#fff; border-radius:8px;
    margin-bottom:1rem; font-size:.88rem; box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.07);
  }
  .legend-dot {
    display:inline-block; width:14px; height:14px; border-radius:3px;
    margin-right:5px; vertical-align:middle;
  }

  /* ── Scroll wrapper ── */
  .tl-outer {
    position:relative;
    background:#edf2f7;
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:10px 0 20px;
  }
  #tl-scroll {
    overflow-x:auto; overflow-y:hidden;
    padding:10px 0 10px;
    cursor:grab;
  }
  #tl-scroll:active { cursor:grabbing; }
  #tl-inner {
    position:relative;
    min-width:4000px;
    height:660px;
  }

  /* ── Thick bar ── */
  #tl-bar {
    position:absolute;
    top:290px; left:0; right:0;
    height:52px;
    background:#2d3748;
    border-radius:4px;
  }

  /* ── Year labels on the bar ── */
  .tl-yr {
    position:absolute;
    top:290px; height:52px;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    color:rgba(255,255,255,.55);
    font-size:11px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.04em;
    transform:translateX(-50%);
    pointer-events:none;
    z-index:5;
  }
  /* active-year highlight (years that have events) */
  .tl-yr.active { color:#fff; }

  /* ── Dot on bar ── */
  .tl-dot {
    position:absolute;
    width:16px; height:16px; border-radius:50%;
    top:309px; left:-8px;
    z-index:15;
    border:3px solid #edf2f7;
  }

  /* ── Connector ── */
  .tl-conn {
    position:absolute;
    width:3px; left:-1.5px; z-index:9;
  }
  .tl-conn.above { bottom:0; top:auto; }
  .tl-conn.below { top:0; }

  /* ── Event wrapper ── */
  .tl-event {
    position:absolute;
    top:0; height:660px; width:1px;
    z-index:10;
  }
  .tl-event:hover { z-index:60; }

  /* ── Card ── */
  .tl-card {
    position:absolute;
    width:168px;
    border-radius:12px;
    padding:11px 13px;
    color:#fff;
    left:-84px;
    z-index:20;
    box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
    transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
    cursor:default;
  }
  .tl-card:hover {
    transform:translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  }
  .tl-card.above { top:40px;  }
  .tl-card.below { top:360px; }

  .tl-card .c-icon { font-size:20px; margin-bottom:5px; display:block; }
  .tl-card .c-title {
    font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; line-height:1.35;
    margin-bottom:5px;
    display:-webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp:3; -webkit-box-orient:vertical;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .tl-card .c-inst {
    font-size:10px; opacity:.8; line-height:1.3;
    margin-bottom:5px;
    display:-webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp:2; -webkit-box-orient:vertical;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .tl-card .c-year {
    font-size:10px; opacity:.6; font-weight:700;
  }

  /* ── Expanded detail panel — shows on hover ── */
  .tl-detail {
    position:absolute;
    width:240px;
    background:#fff; color:#222;
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:13px 15px;
    font-size:11.5px; line-height:1.5;
    box-shadow:0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.22);
    z-index:100;
    opacity:0; pointer-events:none;
    transition:opacity .18s ease;
    left: 94px;   /* right of card */
  }
  .tl-detail.flip { left:auto; right:94px; }  /* flip left if near right edge */
  .tl-detail.above { top:40px; }
  .tl-detail.below { top:360px; }
  .tl-event:hover .tl-detail { opacity:1; pointer-events:auto; }
  .tl-detail .d-title { font-weight:700; font-size:12.5px; margin-bottom:6px; color:#1a3a5c; }
  .tl-detail .d-journal { font-style:italic; color:#555; margin-bottom:4px; font-size:11px; }
  .tl-detail .d-body { color:#333; margin-bottom:6px; }
  .tl-detail .d-pmid { font-size:10px; color:#999; }
  .tl-detail .d-border { height:4px; border-radius:4px 4px 0 0; margin:-13px -15px 10px; border-radius:10px 10px 0 0; }

  /* ── Colors ── */
  .grant   { background:#1a3a5c; }
  .pub     { background:#c0392b; }
  .ramirez { background:#6c3483; }
  .milestone { background:#1a7a4a; }

  .conn-grant   { background:#1a3a5c; }
  .conn-pub     { background:#c0392b; }
  .conn-ramirez { background:#6c3483; }
  .conn-milestone { background:#1a7a4a; }

  /* ── Scroll arrows ── */
  .tl-arrow {
    position:absolute; top:50%; transform:translateY(-50%);
    width:40px; height:40px; border-radius:50%;
    background:rgba(45,55,72,.7); color:#fff;
    font-size:18px; border:none; cursor:pointer; z-index:200;
    display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center;
    transition:background .2s;
  }
  .tl-arrow:hover { background:rgba(45,55,72,.95); }
  .tl-arrow.tl-left  { left:8px; }
  .tl-arrow.tl-right { right:8px; }
</style>

<div class="intro-box">
  <p>Texas leads the nation in hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) incidence, driven by the highest concentration of Hispanic Americans, high rates of metabolic disease, and legacy hepatitis B/C burden. Since 2009, CPRIT has invested <strong>$59&ndash;77 million</strong> in liver cancer research across MD Anderson, BCM, UTSW, UTHealth, and UT Health San Antonio.</p>
</div>

<div class="stat-row">
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">#1</div><div class="lbl">TX HCC incidence nationally</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">$4B+</div><div class="lbl">CPRIT total funding (2025)</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">3&ndash;4&times;</div><div class="lbl">Higher HCC rate: TX Latinos vs NHW</div></div>
  <div class="stat-card"><div class="num">5,000</div><div class="lbl">THCCC cohort patients enrolled</div></div>
</div>

<div class="legend">
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#1a3a5c"></span><strong>CPRIT Grant</strong></span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#c0392b"></span><strong>TX Publication</strong> (BCM / UTSW / MDA)</span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#6c3483"></span><strong>Ramirez Lab</strong> (UTHSCSA)</span>
  <span><span class="legend-dot" style="background:#1a7a4a"></span><strong>Milestone</strong></span>
  <span style="color:#888;font-size:.82rem">Hover a card for details &rarr;</span>
</div>
```

## HCC Research Timeline 2009–2025

```{=html}
<div class="tl-outer">
  <button class="tl-arrow tl-left"  onclick="tlScroll(-400)">&#8592;</button>
  <button class="tl-arrow tl-right" onclick="tlScroll(400)">&#8594;</button>
  <div id="tl-scroll">
    <div id="tl-inner">
      <div id="tl-bar"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  var EVENTS = [
    { year:2009, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'CPRIT Established — First Grants Awarded',
      inst:'Statewide, Texas',
      body:'Voters approved Prop 15 authorizing <b>$3B</b> for cancer research. BCM and MD Anderson liver researchers were early recipients, launching Texas\'s HCC infrastructure.' },
    { year:2011, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Hepatocellular Carcinoma',
      authors:'El-Serag HB',
      journal:'N Engl J Med 2011;365:1118–1127',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine / Houston VA',
      pmid:'21992124',
      body:'Landmark global HCC review documenting the rapid rise of HCV-related HCC as the fastest-growing cause of US cancer deaths.' },
    { year:2012, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'HCC Incidence & Risk Factors in TX Latinos',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'PLoS One 2012;7(4):e35573',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'22530052',
      body:'First study documenting South Texas Latinos have the nation\'s highest HCC rates (10.6/100K). Identified obesity and diabetes as key modifiable risk factors.' },
    { year:2012, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology of Viral Hepatitis and HCC',
      authors:'El-Serag HB',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2012;142(6):1264–1273',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine',
      pmid:'22537432',
      body:'Quantified population-attributable fraction of HBV/HCV in HCC; foundational for Texas public health interventions.' },
    { year:2014, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'HCC in TX Latinos 1995–2010: An Update',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'PLoS One 2014;9(6):e99365',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'24915432',
      body:'Confirmed TX Latino male/female HCC rates <b>3.1× and 4.0×</b> higher than non-Hispanic Whites.' },
    { year:2015, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP150587 — Texas HCC Consortium (THCCC) ~$6M',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      body:'CPRIT Multi-Investigator Award launching the <b>THCCC</b> — 5,000-patient prospective cohort at 5 Texas centers for HCC risk factors and early detection biomarkers.' },
    { year:2017, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'Lifestyle & Clinical Correlates of HCC — Aflatoxin',
      authors:'Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'Clin Gastroenterol Hepatol 2018;16(3):373–380',
      inst:'UTHSCSA / IHPR, San Antonio',
      pmid:'28344065',
      body:'<b>First U.S. study linking aflatoxin exposure to HCC in a Latino-majority population.</b> Cases had 6× higher odds of detectable aflatoxins in blood.' },
    { year:2017, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'AFP + Ultrasound for HCC Detection: Meta-Analysis',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2018;154(6):1706–1718',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'29352041',
      body:'32 studies: AFP + ultrasound improves HCC sensitivity to 63% vs 45% for ultrasound alone. Basis for updated AASLD surveillance guidelines.' },
    { year:2018, type:'milestone', emoji:'🎯',
      title:'THCCC Cohort — 2,000+ Patients Enrolled',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      body:'Semi-annual ultrasound, AFP, labs, and biospecimens collected across 5 Texas sites. One of the largest prospective HCC biomarker repositories in the US.' },
    { year:2018, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology and Management of HCC',
      authors:'Singal AG; El-Serag HB et al.',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2018;154(6):1693–1704',
      inst:'UT Southwestern / BCM',
      body:'Comprehensive review of HCC risk stratification, surveillance, staging, and treatment. Addressed NAFLD/NASH-HCC epidemic and rising rates in Hispanic populations.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'TeCH Center CAP Rd.1 — $13M',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson, Texas',
      body:'CPRIT Collaborative Award establishing the Texas Collaborative Center for HCC (TeCH), coordinating statewide HCC research.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP190641 El-Serag Biomarker Validation — $3M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Biomarker validation grant for HCC early detection research within the THCCC cohort.' },
    { year:2019, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Hwang MDA Patient-Centered Prevention — $2.46M',
      inst:'MD Anderson Cancer Center',
      body:'Patient-centered liver cancer prevention initiative targeting at-risk populations at MD Anderson.' },
    { year:2019, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'THCCC Cohort Study Design',
      authors:'Loo N; El-Serag HB; Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'Am J Gastroenterol 2019;114(3):530–532',
      inst:'BCM / UTSW / MD Anderson / UT San Antonio',
      pmid:'30699099',
      body:'Describes the THCCC 5,000-patient prospective cohort design and multi-center data collection protocol.' },
    { year:2019, type:'ramirez', emoji:'🔬',
      title:'Metformin Modifies HCC Disparity in Diabetic Men',
      authors:'Wang CP; Ramirez AG et al.',
      journal:'Cancer Med 2019;8(6):3206–3215',
      inst:'UTHSCSA, San Antonio (VA Study)',
      pmid:'30993905',
      body:'In 84,433 men with T2D, metformin was associated with reduced HCC risk, with stronger effects in Hispanic and African American men.' },
    { year:2020, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP200537 Singal UTSW — $2.5M',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      body:'3,000-patient cirrhosis cohort developing biomarker-based HCC surveillance algorithms.' },
    { year:2020, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP200554 Thrift BCM — $2.47M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Genetic epidemiology of HCC in Hispanics; focused on PNPLA3 and TM6SF2 variants.' },
    { year:2020, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Epidemiology & Surveillance for HCC: New Trends',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'J Hepatol 2020;72(2):250–261',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'31954490',
      body:'Documents shift from viral hepatitis to NAFLD/NASH as dominant HCC etiology; projects <b>122% increase</b> in NAFLD-HCC by 2030.' },
    { year:2020, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'AGA Update: HCC Surveillance in NAFLD',
      authors:'Singal AG; El-Serag HB',
      journal:'Gastroenterology 2020;158(7):1822–1830',
      inst:'UT Southwestern / BCM',
      body:'Joint AGA expert review on HCC screening in the rapidly growing NAFLD population. Addresses surveillance intervals and novel biomarkers.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'PP220022 UT Health Community Prevention — $1.96M',
      inst:'UT Health Texas',
      body:'Community-based HCC prevention initiative at safety-net clinics targeting underserved Texas populations.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'RP220119 GALAD + AFP-L3 Validation — $2M',
      inst:'BCM Houston',
      body:'Validation of GALAD score and AFP-L3 as early detection biomarkers within the THCCC cohort.' },
    { year:2022, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'TeCH Center CAP Round 2 — ~$18M',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson / UTSW / UTHealth',
      body:'TeCH Center renewal expanding NASH-HCC research and health equity initiatives across Texas institutions.' },
    { year:2022, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'HCC Surveillance Improves Outcomes: Meta-Analysis',
      authors:'Singal AG et al.',
      journal:'J Hepatol 2022;77(1):128–139',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      pmid:'35139400',
      body:'59 studies / 145,396 patients: Surveillance yields 1.86× early-stage detection and <b>33% mortality reduction</b> (HR 0.67).' },
    { year:2022, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'The Texas Collaborative Center for HCC (TeCH)',
      authors:'Harrison AC; El-Serag HB et al.',
      journal:'Front Oncol 2022',
      inst:'BCM / MD Anderson / UTSW / UTHealth',
      pmid:'36059708',
      body:"Describes TeCH's multi-institutional research, education, and advocacy framework targeting reduction of Texas liver cancer mortality by 2030." },
    { year:2023, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Lopez-Terrada TCH Pediatric HCC — $5.98M',
      inst:"Texas Children's Hospital",
      body:'Predictive biomarkers for pediatric HCC and hepatoblastoma.' },
    { year:2023, type:'grant', emoji:'🏆',
      title:'Zhong UTSW HCC Mechanisms — $1.05M',
      inst:'UT Southwestern, Dallas',
      body:'Investigation of molecular mechanisms driving HCC progression and therapeutic targets.' },
    { year:2023, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'Prevention of HCC — White Paper',
      authors:'TeCH Consortium',
      journal:'Hepatol Commun 2023',
      inst:'TeCH Multi-Institution Consortium',
      pmid:'PMC10524305',
      body:'Consensus recommendations covering HBV vaccination, HCV cure, metabolic intervention, and health equity strategies for Hispanic Texas communities.' },
    { year:2024, type:'pub', emoji:'📄',
      title:'HES v2.0 Outperforms GALAD for HCC Detection',
      authors:'El-Serag HB; Jin M et al.',
      journal:'Hepatology 2024',
      inst:'Baylor College of Medicine / THCCC Network',
      body:'Phase 3 biomarker evaluation: HES v2.0 (AFP + AFP-L3 + DCP + clinical variables) demonstrated superior sensitivity and specificity over GALAD for early HCC detection.' },
    { year:2025, type:'milestone', emoji:'🎯',
      title:'CPRIT Surpasses $4B + UTSW NCI Liver Cancer SPORE',
      inst:'UTSW / BCM / MD Anderson, Texas',
      body:'CPRIT surpasses $4B total (~$59–77M to liver cancer). UT Southwestern receives the <b>first Texas NCI SPORE for Liver Cancer</b> with Singal, Yopp et al.' }
  ];

  /* ── Layout ── */
  var MIN_YEAR = 2009, SPAN = 16;
  var CANVAS_W = 4000, PAD = 220;
  var USABLE = CANVAS_W - PAD * 2;

  /* ── Connector heights (card to bar) ── */
  var BAR_TOP = 290;
  var CARD_ABOVE_TOP = 44;
  var CARD_BELOW_TOP = 362;
  var CARD_H = 230;

  /* ── X-jitter for same-year events ── */
  var yearGroups = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    if (!yearGroups[e.year]) yearGroups[e.year] = [];
    yearGroups[e.year].push(i);
  });
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    var grp = yearGroups[e.year];
    var pos = grp.indexOf(i);
    var sz  = grp.length;
    e._xOff = (pos - (sz - 1) / 2) * 190;
  });

  function xFor(year) {
    return PAD + ((year - MIN_YEAR) / SPAN) * USABLE;
  }

  var inner = document.getElementById('tl-inner');

  /* ── Year labels on the bar ── */
  var activeYears = {};
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e) { activeYears[e.year] = true; });
  for (var yr = MIN_YEAR; yr <= MIN_YEAR + SPAN; yr++) {
    var el = document.createElement('div');
    el.className = 'tl-yr' + (activeYears[yr] ? ' active' : '');
    el.style.left = xFor(yr) + 'px';
    el.textContent = yr;
    inner.appendChild(el);
  }

  /* ── Color map ── */
  var COLOR = { grant:'#1a3a5c', pub:'#c0392b', ramirez:'#6c3483', milestone:'#1a7a4a' };

  /* ── Render events ── */
  EVENTS.forEach(function(e, i) {
    var above = (i % 2 === 0);
    var x     = xFor(e.year) + e._xOff;
    var side  = above ? 'above' : 'below';
    var col   = COLOR[e.type] || '#555';

    var wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.className = 'tl-event';
    wrap.style.left = x + 'px';

    /* dot on bar */
    var dot = document.createElement('div');
    dot.className = 'tl-dot';
    dot.style.background = col;
    wrap.appendChild(dot);

    /* connector */
    var conn = document.createElement('div');
    conn.className = 'tl-conn ' + side + ' conn-' + e.type;
    conn.style.background = col;
    if (above) {
      var connTop  = CARD_ABOVE_TOP + CARD_H;
      var connBot  = BAR_TOP + 9; /* dot center */
      conn.style.top    = connTop + 'px';
      conn.style.height = (connBot - connTop) + 'px';
    } else {
      var connTop2 = BAR_TOP + 43; /* below bar */
      var connBot2 = CARD_BELOW_TOP;
      conn.style.top    = connTop2 + 'px';
      conn.style.height = (connBot2 - connTop2) + 'px';
    }
    wrap.appendChild(conn);

    /* visible card */
    var card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'tl-card ' + side;
    card.style.background = col;
    card.innerHTML =
      '<span class="c-icon">' + e.emoji + '</span>' +
      '<div class="c-title">' + e.title + '</div>' +
      '<div class="c-inst">' + (e.inst || '') + '</div>' +
      '<div class="c-year">' + e.year + '</div>';
    wrap.appendChild(card);

    /* detail panel */
    var det = document.createElement('div');
    det.className = 'tl-detail ' + side;
    /* flip panel left if event is in later half of timeline */
    if (x > CANVAS_W * 0.6) det.classList.add('flip');
    var dh = '<div class="d-border" style="background:' + col + '"></div>';
    dh += '<div class="d-title">' + e.emoji + ' ' + e.title + '</div>';
    if (e.authors) dh += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#444;margin-bottom:4px"><strong>Authors:</strong> ' + e.authors + '</div>';
    if (e.journal) dh += '<div class="d-journal">' + e.journal + '</div>';
    if (e.inst)    dh += '<div style="font-size:11px;color:#666;margin-bottom:6px">📍 ' + e.inst + '</div>';
    dh += '<div class="d-body">' + e.body + '</div>';
    if (e.pmid)    dh += '<div class="d-pmid">PMID: ' + e.pmid + '</div>';
    det.innerHTML = dh;
    wrap.appendChild(det);

    inner.appendChild(wrap);
  });

  /* ── Scroll arrows ── */
  window.tlScroll = function(dx) {
    document.getElementById('tl-scroll').scrollBy({ left: dx, behavior: 'smooth' });
  };

  /* ── Drag to scroll ── */
  var scr = document.getElementById('tl-scroll');
  var isDown = false, startX, scrollLeft;
  scr.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) {
    isDown = true; startX = e.pageX - scr.offsetLeft; scrollLeft = scr.scrollLeft;
  });
  scr.addEventListener('mouseleave', function() { isDown = false; });
  scr.addEventListener('mouseup',    function() { isDown = false; });
  scr.addEventListener('mousemove',  function(e) {
    if (!isDown) return;
    e.preventDefault();
    scr.scrollLeft = scrollLeft - (e.pageX - scr.offsetLeft - startX);
  });
})();
</script>
```

---

## Institutions & Key Investigators

| Institution | Key Investigators | Focus Area |
|---|---|---|
| **Baylor College of Medicine (BCM)** | El-Serag HB, Thrift AP, Kanwal F, Beretta L | Epidemiology, biomarkers, THCCC leadership |
| **UT Southwestern (UTSW)** | Singal AG, Yopp AC, Zhong | Surveillance, surgical oncology, disparities |
| **MD Anderson Cancer Center** | Hwang JP, Marrero JA | Prevention, clinical trials, viral hepatitis |
| **UT Health San Antonio (UTHSCSA)** | **Ramirez AG**, Wang CP, Parma DL, Munoz E | HCC disparities, Latino epidemiology, aflatoxin |
| **Texas Children's Hospital** | Lopez-Terrada D | Pediatric HCC, hepatoblastoma biomarkers |

::: {.callout-note}
## Data Sources & Disclaimers
Timeline entries are based on publicly available CPRIT grant awards, PubMed-indexed publications, and institutional announcements. Grant amounts are approximate as reported. PMID numbers provided where confirmed.
:::
